reason: Core utility for calculating and tracking Anthropic API costs based on token usage and model pricing.
description: Provides a centralized utility to calculate costs for input, output, and cached tokens across different Claude models. It handles the specific pricing logic for cache writes (25% premium) and cache reads (90% discount).

context_urls.purpose: Reference for Claude API pricing and token costs

reason: Implementation of the Anthropic text_editor_20250124 tool for programmatic file manipulation.
description: Wraps the low-level file editing operations including 'view', 'insert', 'str_replace', and 'undo'. Manages file system interactions and provides a clean interface for the LLM to execute edits.

context_urls.purpose: Documentation for Anthropic tool use implementation

reason: Logic for determining when to apply prompt caching based on file size and complexity.
description: Implements the 'auto' caching logic. Analyzes file metrics (size, line count, density) to decide if the 1KB/4KB thresholds are met for cost-effective caching.

reason: Main entry point for the library's programmatic API.
description: Orchestrates the interaction between the LLM (Claude), the Editor Tool, and the Cache Manager. Handles the conversation loop, 'think' tool integration, and returns success status and total cost.

reason: Command-line interface for the edit-file utility.
description: Provides the 'edit-file' command. Parses arguments like --model, --cache, and --verbose. Interfaces with the main library to execute edits from the terminal.
